descriptionHtml:
Jeanneau 53 for sale 2011 | 4 Double Cabins - 1 Single Cabin | Tax Not Paid

If you are looking for a well-maintained cruiser for family or charter use, this Jeanneau 53 for sale 2011 could be a strong option to consider. She is offered under the Greek flag, professionally managed and regularly serviced, which is evident in her overall good condition. Designed with comfort and long-range cruising in mind, this yacht features plenty of space, user-friendly systems, and practical upgrades that set her apart in the market.

Specifications

  • Boat Type: Main sail - Fully battened (replaced in 2024)
  • Year of Build: 2011
  • Flag: Greek
  • Cabins: 4 Double, 1 Single
  • Heads: 4 Electric, 1 Manual, each with independent holding tank
  • LOA (Length Over All): 15.73 m
  • Beam: 4.77 m
  • Draft: 2.1 m
  • Displacement: Not specified
  • Fuel Tank: 240 L
  • Water Tank: 1,050 L
  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH4HTE 110 HP Turbo (approx. 3750 hours as of July 2025)
  • Generator: Onan 10 kW (1,000 hours as of July 2025)
  • Inverter: 5 kW
  • Air Conditioning: 3 units
  • Bowthruster: Yes
  • Navigation: Raymarine full suite (Autopilot, Plotter, GPS)
  • Steering wheels: 2
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck shower: Yes
  • Sound System: Radio, CD Player, Cockpit speakers
  • Outboard & Dinghy: Included
  • VAT Status: Not paid

This Jeanneau 53 for sale 2011 is a practical and well-specified example, ready for the season. If you are seeking a yacht in good condition that is well-suited for both private and charter sailing, she represents a well-prepared candidate for your consideration. Contact for further details or viewing arrangements.
